text.title: Data-Driven Requirements Engineering Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the data-driven-requirements methodology end-to-end.

step.name: frame-business-question
step.action: Translate vague ask into measurable business question.

step.name: capture-baseline
step.action: Pull baseline metric snapshot with provenance.

step.name: set-target
step.action: Define measurable target with direction + by_when.

step.name: design-instrumentation
step.action: Events, properties, dashboard ties; review with analytics-eng.

step.name: post-launch-measure
step.action: Compare against target; trigger learn/iterate/kill decision.
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
